personal_info.name: 王庆领
personal_info.biography_summary: 王庆领，东南大学教授，博士生导师。主要从事多智能体分布式控制与优化、集群智能博弈、强化学习等方面的研究。近年来主持国家自然科学基金、科技创新2030—“新一代人工智能”重大项目子课题、江苏省自然科学基金等项目10余项；入选江苏省“333工程”高层次人才、东南大学“我最喜爱的研究生导师”提名暨“学院优秀导师”、东南大学优秀本科生导师等。曾获中国发明协会创新奖二等奖，联合作战智能博弈挑战赛三等奖，江苏省教育教学与研究成果奖一等奖；指导学生获全国智能联合海上作战算法赛一等奖，中国自动化学会青年学术年会最佳理论论文奖等10余项。在国内外学术期刊和会议发表论文100余篇，其中SCI论文60余篇，IEEE汇刊20余篇。

research_interests: 多智能体分布式控制与优化

teaching.course_name: 自适应控制与强化学习
teaching.target_audience: 博士研究生、硕士研究生

student_supervision.recruitment_details: 欢迎自动化、计算机、机械、数学及相关专业学生
student_supervision.postdoc_recruitment: 长期招聘：博士后，可申请“至善博士后”等计划，待遇从优。
student_supervision.contact_address: 南京市四牌楼2号东南大学自动化学院，210096
student_supervision.supervision_summary: 指导毕业博士/硕士研究生超过20人，多人次获国家留学基金委公派联培、研究生国家奖学金、各类校级奖学金等荣誉。
student_supervision.student_achievements_guided: 指导学生获全国智能联合海上作战算法赛一等奖，中国自动化学会青年学术年会最佳理论论文奖等10余项。
graduate_placements: 互联网大厂（腾讯、百度、网易、阿里等）
军工研究所（中国兵器、中国电科等）

research_projects.title: 国家自然科学基金-面上项目，非线性多智能体系统分布式最优一致性研究
江苏省自然科学基金-面上项目，具有控制系数未知的不确定多智能体一致性问题研究
安徽省重点研究与开发计划项目-课题，面向无人集群系统的自主决策与智能学习关键技术及应用
research_projects.funding_source: 安徽省重点研究与开发计划项目

research_projects.title: 国家自然科学基金-国际合作与交流项目，基于强化学习的多智能体抗干扰协同控制及应用
国家自然科学基金-面上项目，高阶非线性多智能体系统的控制系数未知问题研究
国家科技创新2030—“新一代人工智能”重大项目子课题，事件与数据驱动的智能增强建模与评估
research_projects.funding_source: 国家科技创新2030—“新一代人工智能”重大项目

publications: W. Zhu, Q. Wang, Distributed finite-time optimization of multi-agent systems with time-varying cost functions under digraphs, IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering, 2024, 11(1): 556 - 565.

W. Zhu, W. Wu, Q. Wang, A continuous-time algorithm for distributed opti-mization with nonuniform time-delay under switching and unbalanced digraphs, IEEE Transactions on Signal and Information Processing over Networks, 2024, 10: 765 - 775.

Y. Su, Q. Wang, C. Sun, Primal-dual fixed point algorithms based on adapted metric for distributed optimization with bounded communication delays, IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2024, DOI: 10.1109/TAC.2024.3470841.

Q. Wang, H.E. Psillakis, C. Sun, Frank L. Lewis, Adaptive NN distributed control for time-varying networks of nonlinear agents with antagonistic interactions, IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 32(6): 2573-2583, 2021.
Q. Wang, C. Sun, Distributed asymptotic consensus in directed networks of nonaffine systems with nonvanishing disturbance, IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica, 8(6):1133-1140, 2021.

Q. Wang, H.E. Psillakis, C. Sun, Cooperative control of multiple high-order agents with non-identical unknown control directions under fixed and time-varying topologies, IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 51(4):2582-2591, 2021.

Q. Wang, H.E. Psillakis, C. Sun, Adaptive cooperative control with guaranteed convergence in time-varying networks of nonlinear dynamical systems, IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 50(12): 5035-5046, 2020.

Q. Wang, C. Sun, Adaptive consensus of multi-agent systems with unknown high-frequency gain signs under directed graphs, IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 50(6): 2181-2186, 2020.

Q. Wang, H.E. Psillakis, C. Sun, Cooperative control of multiple agents with unknown high-frequency gain signs under unbalanced and switching topologies, IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 64(6): 2495-2501, 2019.

A. Gkesoulis, H. E. Psillakis, Q. Wang, PdI regulation for consensus: application to unknown pure-feedback agents with state and communication delays, IEEE Transactions on Control of Network Systems, 8 (4): 1964 -1974, 2021.

X. Wang, Q. Wang, C. Sun, Prescribed performance fault-tolerant control for uncertain nonlinear MIMO system using actor-critic learning structure, IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 33 (9): 4479 - 4490, 2022.
H.E. Psillakis, Q. Wang, Distributed adaptive consensus of nonlinear heterogeneous agents with delayed and sampled neighbor measurements, IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 52 (4): 2340 -2350, 2022.
Y. Su, Q. Wang, C. Sun, Distributed primal-dual method for convex optimization with coupled constraints, IEEE Transactions on Signal Processing, 70：523 – 535, 2022.
